## Description
The same jar-and-fridge routine as overnight oats, with extra seeds for body.

## Instructions
1. Combine oats, chia, flaxseed, oat milk, and maple syrup in a pint jar.
2. Stir well, seal, and refrigerate at least 4 hours, ideally overnight.
3. Stir again in the morning before eating.

## Notes
- Lives in a subdirectory to exercise recursive corpus discovery.
